EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} changed configuration on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} overwrote ARP information for {dst.ip} to {dst.mac} on the interface "{interface}"
The user {subject.name} changed a class for the user {datafield1}
The user {subject.name} changed authentication for root
The user {subject.name} changed attributes for the user {datafield1}
